---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for EvoMind
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem are you trying to solve? Why does it matter?
_Example: "When I have 100 PDFs, I can't tell which topics are best covered because..."_

## Proposed solution
A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Which area does this touch?
- [ ] Ingestion / PDF parsing
- [ ] Question generation
- [ ] Solving / retrieval
- [ ] Reflection / learning loop
- [ ] Synthesis / knowledge graph
- [ ] LLM providers
- [ ] Frontend / UI
- [ ] Docs / DX
- [ ] Other

## Additional context
Mockups, links, or examples that help explain the idea.
